name: small restaurants processing 10-20 orders/week tool
description: For small restaurants processing 10-20 orders/week, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts. We automate inventory management instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem_solved: Inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts and over-ordering.
